name: Colbie Caillat
abstract: Colbie Marie Caillat ( KOHL-bee kal-AY; born May 28, 1985) is an American singer-songwriter. She rose to fame on the social networking website Myspace in 2005.

concerts.label: Christmas with Tim Janis and Special Guests: Tori Kelly, Colbie Caillat, and Us The Duo
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Meet Me in St. Louis: Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas
